Params: {1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory545.jpg'}
{1: 'DialogDisable'}
{1: 'Babylonia, Conference Room.', 2: 'Two months ago'}
{3: 'Two months ago, Babylonia, conference room.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Having concluded his meeting with Nikola, Hassen placed a call to Teddy\'s terminal.'}
{3: 'It didn\'t connect immediately, and Hassen held the line without a hint of impatience.'}
{3: 'Twenty seconds later, the connection clicked through.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory894.jpg', 2: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Teddy', 3: 'President Hassen. How did you get this channel\'s IP?', 4: '11'}
{3: 'Her tone was neither respectful nor discourteous.'}
{2: 'Hassen', 3: 'The method isn\'t important.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Hassen', 3: 'Teddy, I have a critical mission for you.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'A mission that has to bypass the Command Center?', 4: '11'}
{2: 'Hassen', 3: 'The Command Center maintains synchronized records. This requires discretion.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'The Task Force is full of elite squads. I\'m just an Engineering member.', 4: '11'}
{2: 'Hassen', 3: 'I need your specific expertise in cybersecurity.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Hassen heard the faint, resigned sigh Teddy let out on the other end of the line.'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'Can\'t this wait until my new frame is operational?', 4: '11'}
{2: 'Hassen', 3: 'The frame won\'t make a difference.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'On the other end of the line, Teddy paused, as if contemplating something.'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'I want the frame switch costs fully covered.', 4: '11'}
{2: 'Hassen', 3: '...Wasn\'t that already approved?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'That budget only covers half.', 4: '11'}
{2: 'Hassen', 3: 'If I remember correctly... you commissioned that upgrade as a personal project. You designed it yourself and sourced the components independently.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Hassen', 3: 'Reimbursing half was already an exception.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'That\'s what I\'ve been wondering. If it were just a personal project, why approve any funding at all?', 4: '11'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'Something about this smells fishy.', 4: '11'}
{2: 'Hassen', 3: 'Complete this mission, and we will reimburse the full cost.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'Let\'s be clear: I\'m not looking to get entangled in your schemes. I just do my job.', 4: '11'}
{2: 'Hassen', 3: 'Of course. If the situation becomes too complicated, you have full authorization to disengage and extract yourself.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'Just tell me. What am I supposed to investigate or find?', 4: '11'}
{3: 'Hassen gives a smile.'}
{2: 'Hassen', 3: 'Already figured out it\'s an investigation mission, huh?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Hassen', 3: 'Have you heard a certain legend circulating on the surface?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Hassen', 3: 'One they call the "digital paradise."', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Hassen', 3: 'Supposedly—and I must stress, this is only a rumor—there is a place on the surface known as the "digital paradise."', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Hassen', 3: 'It\'s said to welcome those disillusioned with reality. Anyone who finds it can live out their days in a virtual, networked world.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'Sounds a lot like the Tabula Akasha.', 4: '11'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'Probably just a distorted rumor. I\'d bet that\'s where this rumor started.', 4: '11'}
{2: 'Hassen', 3: 'Who knows...', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'So my official mission is to investigate this legend?', 4: '11'}
{2: 'Hassen', 3: 'Yes, that is the mission being logged with the Command Center.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'And the other part? The "things you need me to do"?', 4: '11'}
{2: 'Hassen', 3: 'After this, there is no turning back. Have you made up your mind?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: '...Do I have a choice? I\'m the best candidate you could find, aren\'t I?', 4: '11'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'Fine. I\'ll do it.', 4: '11'}
{2: 'Hassen', 3: 'Your mission this time: locate as many quantum supercomputers without AI as possible.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Teddy fell silent the moment Hassen finished speaking.'}
{3: 'She only found her voice again after a long pause.'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: '...When Parliament voted to unlock the Gestalt data wall, which side were you on?', 4: '11'}
{3: 'Hassen remained unfazed, offering a slight smile in response to Teddy\'s sharp tone.'}
{2: 'Hassen', 3: 'Barring special circumstances, the President does not participate in voting.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Realizing she had overstepped, Teddy didn\'t press the issue further.'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'If the digital paradise is real, it would require a massive computational foundation.', 4: '11'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'You suspect it\'s a quantum supercomputer without an AI.', 4: '11'}
{2: 'Hassen', 3: 'Precisely. And your only task is to confirm its existence.', 4: '1'}
{1: 'DialogDisable'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory744.jpg'}
{1: 'Surface', 2: 'One month ago'}
{3: 'One month ago, Earth.'}
{3: 'Teddy shut down her terminal, and with it, the holographic map dissolved.'}
{3: 'The memory of her conversation with Hassen surfaced, drawing a resigned sigh from her.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Teddy', 3: 'I didn\'t get a damn thing out of him.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'I don\'t know what he\'s planning, but I\'m clearly just a pawn on his board...', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'Guess I have to play my part first...', 4: '1'}
{3: 'For the past month, Teddy had been scouring Earth for any information on the digital paradise.'}
{3: 'Only recently had she finally uncovered a significant lead.'}
{3: 'Her terminal rang, and Teddy looked up, surprised by the name on the caller ID.'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'Let me guess. You screwed something up and need me to clean up your mess?', 4: '1'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory894.jpg', 2: '1'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Her contempt radiated through the communication channel, striking Leonardo like a physical blow.'}
{2: 'Leonardo', 3: 'Is that really what you think of me? My reputation has fallen so far?', 4: '11'}
{3: 'With a dramatic gasp, Leonardo clutched his chest and feigned heartbreak.'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'Spare me the performance. What do you want?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Leonardo', 3: 'The old man is dying.', 4: '11'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory744.jpg'}
{3: 'For a moment, the news left Teddy strangely adrift.'}
{3: 'Should she break out in applause?'}
{3: 'She had imagined this moment countless times, yet now felt none of the anticipated satisfaction.'}
{3: 'Should she be weeping with grief?'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryWhiteNew.prefab', 2: '3'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory894.jpg'}
{1: '1', 3: 'The gestures felt foreign. She still vividly remembered everything Charles had done to forge her into "Dominik\'s successor."'}
{3: 'But worst of all, Charles initiated Project Herald and sent his own son—Teddy\'s father—to his death.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryWhiteNew.prefab', 2: '3'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory744.jpg'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory894.jpg', 2: '1'}
{1: '1', 3: 'For him, she could summon neither triumph nor sorrow, only a chilling, profound detachment.'}
{2: 'Leonardo', 3: 'How cold-hearted.', 4: '11'}
{3: 'Teddy shot Leonardo a glare.'}
{2: 'Leonardo', 3: 'The family is already making arrangements.', 4: '11'}
{2: 'Leonardo', 3: 'It\'s going to be a grand affair.', 4: '11'}
{2: 'Leonardo', 3: 'By the way, Victoria seems quite dedicated to running the corporation. Sometimes I see a bit of the old man in her.', 4: '11'}
{2: 'Leonardo', 3: 'There are perks to being a carefree gentleman of leisure. Plenty of funds to enjoy.', 4: '11'}
{2: 'Leonardo', 3: 'Between you and me, I\'m already planning my next vacation.', 4: '11'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: '...Keep an eye on Victoria. Help her if she needs it.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Leonardo', 3: 'You really do have a low opinion of me.', 4: '11'}
{2: 'Leonardo', 3: 'I\'m already looking out for her. You didn\'t even have to ask.', 4: '11'}
{3: 'Leonardo offered a gentle smile.'}
{2: 'Leonardo', 3: 'After all, you\'re both my little sisters.', 4: '11'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'Ugh, don\'t be disgusting!', 4: '1'}
{3: 'The call concluded, Teddy turned her attention back to the mission, her eyes fixed on the distant conservation area.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory700.jpg'}
{1: 'DialogDisable'}
{1: 'Conservation Area', 2: 'Surface'}
{3: 'Surface, Conservation Area'}
{3: 'The lead brought Teddy to a structure so dilapidated it was charitable to call it a shop.'}
{3: 'It was a single-room warehouse, its door left slightly open. A crudely lettered "REPAIRS" sign hung at the entrance.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStory/FxUiStoryBlackPassScene.prefab', 2: '3'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory83.jpg'}
{3: 'Inside, the air was thick with the scent of machine oil. Rusty shelves lined the walls, bearing an assortment of well-used tools.'}
{3: 'A young man with chestnut-brown hair glanced up as she entered.'}
{3: 'He reached for a tattered rag, cleaning the stains from his hands before offering an enthusiastic greeting.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Tony', 3: 'Hey there! Name\'s Tony. This is my place.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Tony', 3: 'What can I fix for you today?', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Teddy cut to the chase.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Teddy', 3: 'Do you know Elean?', 4: '2'}
{3: 'Tony\'s smile wavered slightly.'}
{2: 'Tony', 3: 'Lots of folks pass through. Can\'t remember everyone, and Elean\'s a common name.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Tony', 3: 'Mind if I ask... who are you with? And what\'s your business with Elean?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'I\'m Teddy. Vice-Captain of the Babylonia Engineering Force.', 4: '2'}
{3: 'Hearing her answer, the hostility in Tony\'s demeanor visibly drained away.'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'Let\'s skip the act. I know you\'re with that... "Emergency Sunshine" group.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Tony', 3: 'It\'s "For a Better Tomorrow - Sunlight Shines on All - Battlefield Trauma Emergency Rescue Team".', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Tony', 3: 'Look, Elean\'s not here. We don\'t even know where she is right now.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'Who was she talking to before she left?', 4: '2'}
{3: 'Tony studied Teddy, a look of understanding crossing his face.'}
{2: 'Tony', 3: 'You\'re not really here for Elean, are you? You\'re trying to find someone else through her.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Tony gestured toward a rickety chair in the store.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Tony', 3: 'Take a seat. This whole thing actually started with one of your Babylonia Constructs.', 4: '1'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory700.jpg'}
{2: 'Tony', 3: 'The Praying Mantis squad was posted here for a long time, in this conservation area.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Tony', 3: 'They were good people. One of them, a Construct named Moore...'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Tony', 3: 'Well... Elean fell for him. They even got married.'}
{2: 'Tony', 3: 'Everything was going great. Then, out of nowhere,'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryWhiteNew.prefab', 2: '3'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory319.png'}
{2: 'Tony', 3: 'The Punishing Virus concentration spiked in the area. The Red Tide, those Hetero-Creatures...', 22: '1'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryWhiteNew.prefab', 2: '3'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory83.jpg'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Tony', 3: 'It was a nightmare. A lot of people died. Moore gave his life to protect the place... and Ryan, the kid who was always with Elean, he didn\'t make it either.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Teddy', 3: 'When did all this happen?', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Tony answered with unmistakable honesty.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Tony', 3: 'After that... Elean just shut down. Became a real loner.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Tony', 3: 'She started talking to some people from outside the conservation area, and then one day, she just left.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Tony', 3: 'Maybe she\'s made a new life for herself somewhere.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Tony', 3: 'I hope so, anyway...', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Tony murmured words he barely believed himself.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Tony', 3: 'If you\'re looking for those people she talked to, you could try heading east.', 4: '1'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory534.jpg'}
{3: 'Acting on Tony\'s suggestion, Teddy left the conservation area and headed east.'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory393.jpg', 3: '0', 4: '1', 5: '1'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory393.jpg'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory346.jpg', 3: '0', 4: '1', 5: '1'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory346.jpg'}
{3: 'She traversed sandy terrain and hills, passing through zones with low concentrations of the Punishing Virus.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStory/FxUiStoryBlackPassScene.prefab', 2: '3'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory536.jpg'}
{3: 'In a forest clearing, she discovered signs of human settlement.'}
{3: 'Following these traces, she located a four-person merchant group. By hacking their terminal and checking their communications, she confirmed they were heading toward a base.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory394.jpg'}
{3: 'After tailing the group for three days, Teddy arrived at a location nestled among the mountains.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Teddy', 3: 'This must be the place.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'After contacting someone through their terminal, the leader of the merchant group waited in place.'}
{3: 'Teddy watched them unload supplies and talk amongst themselves, but seven minutes later, a cold dread settled in her gut.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Teddy', 3: 'I\'ve been spotted!', 4: '1'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryLineSpreadNew.prefab', 2: '2'}
{3: 'Realizing this, Teddy immediately retreated.'}
{3: 'The question of how burned in her mind, but before she could dwell on it, something unexpected happened.'}
{2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryLineSpreadNew.prefab'}
{3: 'Her own terminal flared with a warning from an embedded security program.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Teddy', 3: 'A reverse hack?! It\'s... transmitting my coordinates!', 4: '1'}
{3: 'She ran, her fingers flying across her own device to fend off the relentless cyber attacks.'}
{3: 'And then, it hit her.'}
{3: 'The intrusion technique—the specific, brutal elegance of it—was all too familiar. She had seen it countless times before.'}
{3: 'A name rose to the tip of her tongue, but the word caught in her throat.'}
{3: 'A heavy thud landed behind her.'}
{3: 'She never imagined they would meet again like this.'}
{3: 'Turning slowly, she was met with a flash of that familiar lavender hair.'}
{3: 'The figure stared back, her face a mirror of Teddy\'s own shock.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Moineau', 3: 'Why... did it have to be you?', 4: '1'}
{1: 'DialogDisable'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory423.jpg'}
{1: 'Moore\'s Home', 2: 'Elysium'}
{3: 'Elysium, Moore\'s home.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Teddy', 3: 'She attacked me. Then I woke up here, in Elysium.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Teddy finished her story.'}
{3: 'The battle at the morgue had ended the night before, and this morning, she had knocked on their door.'}
{3: 'Under their slightly bewildered gazes, she recounted everything that had happened after accepting the mission from Babylonia.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Teddy', 3: 'Last night, she attacked me again and rewrote my memories.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'Once I figured out "Christina" and "Norman" were just my memory protection programs, I set a contingency plan in motion.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'But the memories I have right now will be gone soon.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'Moineau... she\'s really a tough one.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Teddy let out a soft chuckle.'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'She probably has no idea what I\'ve done yet.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'According to my reprogrammed protocol, I\'ll get all my real memories back in about six or seven hours.', 4: '1'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryWhiteNew.prefab', 2: '3'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1372.jpg'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'My previous protection programs discovered that the top floor of the Central Building houses Elysium\'s "core."'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'It\'s the "interface" connecting the external quantum supercomputer to this world.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryWhiteNew.prefab', 2: '3'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory423.jpg'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Teddy', 3: 'When the time comes, I\'ll lure Moineau to the rooftop to settle it all at once.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'Once it\'s decided, I\'ll use that "interface" to return to the real world.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Moore\'s mind reeled, overwhelmed by the torrent of information, leaving him unable to process another word from Teddy.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Teddy', 3: 'I came here because... I believe you have the right to know the truth.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'And then... I hope you won\'t stand in my way.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'I\'m not sure what Moineau is planning; her motives are too ambiguous...', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Teddy\'s gaze fell. When she spoke again, it was less to him and more as if she were thinking aloud.'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'There was no reason for her to attack me and rewrite my memories. It doesn\'t add up. It\'s too extreme...', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'Unless... there\'s something "Teddy from Babylonia" was never supposed to find out.', 4: '1'}
